title: Sharp-tec Diagonal Cutters 160mm Chrome-Plated VDE-Certified, 1000V Insulated Pliers for Electricians, Insulated Handle DIN EN IEC 60900, 6-inch Professional Wire Cutters
features: 【1000V Safety Certified For Electrical Work】：Insulated handles meet DIN EN IEC 60900 standard, VDE-tested for 1000V AC/DC protection. Ideal for electricians & industrial use.
【Ultra-Sharp Hardened Blades】：Heat-treated cutting edges with hardness rating of HRC 55-65 for superior durability. Chrome plating resists corrosion, ensures the side cutters long-lasting.
【Ergonomic Non-Slip Handles For Comfort】：Dual-material TPR/PP grips reduce hand fatigue, even during prolonged use. Textured surface ensures secure control.
【Compact & Durable 160mm Design】：21mm jaw opening for heavy-duty tasks. Ideal for electricians, HVAC, and automotive work. 160mm/6-inch length optimizes control in tight spaces.

【After-sales Service】：We are a British seller of professional tools. Sharp-tec will deliver you achieve the optimal balance between safety, flexibility, performance and value. Please do not hesitate to contact us if have any questions.
